alkylation reagent: supplemented with TCEP (8 mM) and chloroacetamide (32 mM)
alkylation concentration: supplemented with TCEP (8 mM) and chloroacetamide (32 mM)
cleavage agent: subjected to overnight enzymatic digestion (0.5 µg, Sequencing Grade Modified Trypsin, Promega)
collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD) with normalized collision energies of 27
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
